player.cube.title: Cube of Space
player.gematria.title: Gematria
player.healing.intoneThenClick: Intone three times, then click to continue
player.healing.intoneThenTap: Intone three times, then tap to continue
player.healing.setup: For each planet, meditate on the card and color for one minute. If you like, breathe with the circle to follow a four-fold breathe cycle. You will then be asked to intone the mantra IAO three times.
player.lrp.title: The Lesser Ritual of the Pentagram
player.lrp.vision.avrial: Auriel is robed in citrine, olive, russet and black (an overall impression is a dark robe). Stands in a rich wheat-field. Bathe your aura with the colors and love of Nature.
player.lrp.vision.gbrial: Gabriel is robed in blue, with a stream or sea at its feet. Bathe your aura in a blue, purifying sea of compassion.
player.lrp.vision.mikal: Michael is robed in red, standing on parched Earth or desert. Radiates heat. Bathe your aura in a red consecratine fire and glow with the fire of life.
player.lrp.vision.rpal: Raphael is robed in yellow, hair moving in the wind—a sensation of a cooling breeze from the East. Bathe your aura with a yellow breeze.
